---
name: obligatory_ai-generated-comment
description: Enforces that every newly created file and every newly created class includes the comment "generated by AI in Github cloud" near the top of the file and directly above each new class definition. Always apply this rule when creating any new file or class in the codebase.
---

# Obligatory AI Generated Comment

## Rule

For every newly created file and every newly created class, include the following comment text **exactly**:

```
generated by AI in Github cloud
```

## Guidelines

- Add this comment near the top of every new file (before imports or as the first comment).
- Add this comment in or directly above each new class definition.
- Keep the text exact — do not paraphrase or modify it — for consistency and auditability.
- This applies to all programming languages and file types.

## Examples

### Java
```java
// generated by AI in Github cloud
public class HelloWorld {
    // ...
}
```

### Python
```python
# generated by AI in Github cloud
class HelloWorld:
    pass
```
